title: Zenbu of Tokyo
original_title: ゼンブ・オブ・トーキョー
overview: Groups of high school students embark on an eagerly-anticipated school trip to Tokyo. An enthusiastic group leader, Yurika, has planned a packed itinerary to cover every must-see sight such as Skytree in Asakusa, the Shibuya Scramble Crossing, and the Tokyo Tower. However, the rest of the group secretly has different plans to achieve their true purpose… 11 girls scatter and scramble across Tokyo creating the best memories!

trailers.title: 『ゼンブ・オブ・トーキョー』特報【10月25日(金)全国ロードショー】
